name: King's Synchro
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>王者の調和</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>キングス・シンクロ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent's monster declares an attack on a Synchro Monster you control: Negate the attack, then you can apply the rest of this card's effect. Banish that Synchro Monster you control and 1 Tuner from your GY, and if you do, Special Summon from your Extra Deck 1 Synchro Monster whose Level equals the total Levels the banished monsters had. (This is treated as a Synchro Summon.)
eff: When your opponent's monster declares an attack on a Synchro Monster you control: Negate the attack, then you can apply the rest of this card's effect. Banish that Synchro Monster you control and 1 Tuner from your GY, and if you do, Special Summon from your Extra Deck 1 Synchro Monster whose Level equals the total Levels the banished monsters had. (This is treated as a Synchro Summon.)

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Synchro Summon
